title: Load Event
description: Occurs before a form is displayed for the first time.
notes: You can use this event to perform tasks before a form is shown to the user.
see_also:
Applies To

Form

Click Event

GUI Items: Load Event

Form
examples:
Function frmMain_Load(Sender$ As String)

		  GSet frmMain.txtSpeed.Text, Str$(g_RobotSpeed)

Fend
